languages.text: {n}На острых скулах Ювенны проступают желваки — она стоически держит лицо, но судорожно стиснутая челюсть выдает ее волнение. Безмятежность и холодная уверенность разом испаряются из ее взгляда, уступая место видимому напряжению. Она явно замешана в том, что произошло с войсками Гапраков.{/n}

{n}Juvenna's sharp cheekbones tense — she stoically maintains her expression, but her jaw clenches fitfully, betraying her agitation. All at once, the serenity and cool self-assurance vanish from her gaze, giving way to visible strain. She was involved in whatever happened to the Gaprak troops — that much is clear.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}На острых скулах Ювенны проступают желваки — она стоически держит лицо, но судорожно стиснутая челюсть выдает ее волнение. languages.text: {n}Los pómulos afilados de Juvenna se tensan: contiene su expresión estoicamente, pero la fuerza con la que aprieta la mandíbula traiciona su nerviosismo. Al instante, la serenidad y la seguridad se desvanecen de su mirada, reemplazadas por un esfuerzo visible. Está relacionada con el incidente de las tropas Gaprak; de eso no hay duda.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna's sharp cheekbones tense — she stoically maintains her expression, but her jaw clenches fitfully, betraying her agitation. All at once, the serenity and cool self-assurance vanish from her gaze, giving way to visible strain. She was involved in whatever happened to the Gaprak troops — that much is clear.{/n}

languages.text: {n}尤文娜棱角分明的颧骨绷紧了——她勉强维持住镇定的表情，下巴却不自觉地咬紧，暴露了她的焦躁。她眼中原本的从容和自信瞬间消失殆尽，取而代之的是明显的紧张。显然，贾帕克部队的失踪事件与她脱不了干系。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna's sharp cheekbones tense — she stoically maintains her expression, but her jaw clenches fitfully, betraying her agitation. All at once, the serenity and cool self-assurance vanish from her gaze, giving way to visible strain. She was involved in whatever happened to the Gaprak troops — that much is clear.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}尤文娜棱角分明的颧骨绷紧了——她勉强维持住镇定的表情，下巴却不自觉地咬紧，暴露了她的焦躁。她眼中原本的从容和自信瞬间消失殆尽，取而代之的是明显的紧张。显然，贾帕克部队的失踪事件与她脱不了干系。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les pommettes saillantes de Juvenna se crispent et, si elle ne se départ pas de son sang-froid apparent, ses mâchoires sont agitées de tics qui trahissent son trouble intérieur. Subitement, la sérénité et l'assurance inébranlables qui animaient son regard cèdent la place à une tension palpable. Quoi qu'il soit advenu des troupes de la maison Gaprak, elle a visiblement joué un rôle dans leur disparition.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna's sharp cheekbones tense — she stoically maintains her expression, but her jaw clenches fitfully, betraying her agitation. All at once, the serenity and cool self-assurance vanish from her gaze, giving way to visible strain. She was involved in whatever happened to the Gaprak troops — that much is clear.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Juvenna'nın keskin elmacık kemikleri geriliyor. İfadesini metanetle koruyor ancak çenesi spazmlar hâlinde kasılarak tedirginliğini ele veriyor. Bir anda gözlerindeki dinginlik ve serin öz güven kayboluyor, yerini gözle görülür bir gerginliğe bırakıyor. Gaprak birliklerine her ne olduysa onda parmağı var. Bu çok açık.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna's sharp cheekbones tense — she stoically maintains her expression, but her jaw clenches fitfully, betraying her agitation. All at once, the serenity and cool self-assurance vanish from her gaze, giving way to visible strain. She was involved in whatever happened to the Gaprak troops — that much is clear.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Juvennas scharfe Wangenknochen erstarren ... sie wahrt stoisch ihren Gesichtsausdruck, aber ihr mahlender Kiefer verrät ihre Erregung. Mit einem Mal weicht die Gelassenheit und kühle Selbstsicherheit in ihrem Gesicht einer sichtlichen Anspannung. Was auch immer den Truppen von Haus Gaprak passiert ist, sie war daran beteiligt. So viel steht fest.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna's sharp cheekbones tense — she stoically maintains her expression, but her jaw clenches fitfully, betraying her agitation. languages.text: {n}ジュベナは頬骨をこわばらせ、表情は崩さないが、顎が痙攣する。彼女の冷静な表情は崩れ、わずかな表情の変化が彼女の動揺を物語る。彼女の目は、かつての静けさと冷静さを失い、わずかな表情の変化が彼女の動揺を物語る。ギャプラク軍の兵士が何があったのかは、彼女も関わっていたのだろう。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna's sharp cheekbones tense — she stoically maintains her expression, but her jaw clenches fitfully, betraying her agitation. All at once, the serenity and cool self-assurance vanish from her gaze, giving way to visible strain. She was involved in whatever happened to the Gaprak troops — that much is clear.{/n}
